jcr:root.jcr:title: WKND Tools
jcr:root.jcr:description: Custom utilities for the WKND site.

course-importer.jcr:title: Course Importer
course-importer.jcr:description: Import courses from DAM CSV files.

audit-logs.jcr:title: Import Audit Logs
audit-logs.jcr:description: View historical reports and real-time logs of course imports.
